name: law firms managing 5–15 contracts/month tool
description: For law firms managing 5–15 contracts/month, poor compliance monitoring causes legal penalties. We provide automated compliance alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to monitor contract compliance effectively, leading to potential legal penalties.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of compliance metrics through spreadsheets
